certificateDescription: Certificate of completion of the Figma course on OpenWebinars. This course covers the basics of Figma, a popular design tool for creating user interfaces and prototypes.
Certificate of completion of the B2 Cambridge English course.
Certificate of completion of the Networks Basic course on Cisco Networking Academy. This course covers the fundamentals of networking, including network protocols, topologies, and security.
Certificate of completion of the Web Responsive Design course on FreeCodeCamp. This course covers the basics of web design, including HTML, CSS, and responsive design principles.
